name: Cranberry Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into quarters and remove the skin.
2. Place the chicken in the slow cooker with onions, cranberries, salt, cinnamon, ginger, orange rind, and orange juice.
3. Cover and cook on low for 5 to 6 hours.
4. Remove the chicken from the pot and separate the meat from the bones. Set aside.
5. Mix melted butter, flour, and brown sugar (if using) in a bowl.
6. Drain excess liquid from the cooking pot, if necessary.
7. Add the butter mixture to the slow cooker and stir until combined.
8. Cook for an additional 10 minutes on low heat, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has thickened slightly.
